BIG BELL GOLD OPERATIONS 
HARMONY 
  
meta-gabbro. Styles of gold mineralisation include shear hosted quartz veining, 
quartz vein stockworks, alteration zones and supergene blankets. 
Chalcopyrite, pyrite and pyrrhotite mineralisation occurs within a zone of alteration 
that strike north-south through the tenement package (Figure 4), possibly parallel to 
the lithological trend.
